AI Sales & Inventory Engine

Platform telemetry analyzing daily velocities and predicting market trends

Inventory Shortage & Restock Predictions
{% if not suggestions %}
All product inventory levels are healthy relative to current sales velocity!
{% else %}

Based on daily sales velocity, the following items require attention. Restock recommendations include a 5-item safety stock buffer:

{% for sugg in suggestions %}
{{ sugg.name }}
Restock Suggestion
Current Stock: {{ sugg.current_stock }} units
Daily Sales Velocity: {{ sugg.daily_sales_velocity }} sold/day
Suggested restock quantity: {{ sugg.suggested_restock }} units
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
Dead Inventory Alerts
{% if not dead_inventory %}
No inactive or non-selling inventory items flagged. Good velocity!
{% else %}

The following active products have had zero purchases in the last 30 days. Consider adjusting details, prices, or promotion settings:

{% for dead in dead_inventory %}
{{ dead.name }}
Stock: {{ dead.stock }} units | Price: ${{ dead.price }}
0 Sales (30 Days)
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
Sales Trend Prediction
Growth Slope {% if forecast.slope_revenue > 0.5 %} Positive (+{{ "%.2f"|format(forecast.slope_revenue) }}) {% elif forecast.slope_revenue < -0.5 %} Negative ({{ "%.2f"|format(forecast.slope_revenue) }}) {% else %} Stable ({{ "%.2f"|format(forecast.slope_revenue) }}) {% endif %}
Projected Sales ${{ "%.2f"|format(forecast.predicted_revenue_next_period) }}
Linear Trend Analysis

The projection uses a linear regression (ordinary least squares) formula calculated dynamically against your historical daily order logs. Sales are projected to hit {{ forecast.predicted_volume_next_period }} units over the next 30 days, totaling an estimated ${{ "%.2f"|format(forecast.predicted_revenue_next_period) }} in store revenues.

No sales history logged to compute bestsellers.

{% else %}

{{ top.name }}

{% endfor %}
